Will the Bullish run continue at Sensex?
Friday, 22 August , 2003, 15:24
There is exuberance in the market place with Sensex crossing the 4000 points. There
are doubts whether the present Bullish trend will continue. And also there are wild
speculations about the Sensex crossing 4800 mark!
The answers to these questions can be answered by looking at the annual horoscope of
India…
Astrological Details
The antara of Venus is starting from Aug 22, 2003.
